title: Senior Teacher - IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions!
